entry.title: Attachment mandatory for vendor master data attachment mandatory
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to set attachment as mandatory for vendor master data in SAP ECC ?

If yes, it is possible de set this only for some countries ?

If not, is there any intermediate SAP tools allowing that ? 

Regards, Thank you!

entry.title: FBCJ: Error Message KI 260 only triggered when posting, not saving?
entry.content:
FBCJ transaction could be saved despite cost center is blocked

but when try to post the already saved document, message KI 260 is triggered.

My client need to trigger this message to saving step, not posting. Any idea?

entry.title: TDS Deducted in down payment auto adjust at the time of invoice posting
entry.content: During down payment to vendor, we deducted TDS after that we received invoice for more or less amount. I want to auto adjust TDS deducted at time invoice posting. so how to configure same for auto adjustment and what are prerequisite.

entry.title: Payment term 001 not defined - Message No. F5839
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting above subjected error while posting Item Interest Calculation.

I have uploaded the TCODE FINT Calculation screen in attachment.

There is no payment Term 001 available in DB still why I'm getting this error as payment term 001 not defined. I have configured 0001 standard Payment term which is correctly configured.

Please advise how to resolve this error?

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: G/L account 2298841 where the balance of $2,811.63 still remains open
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

This is related to the G/L account 2298841 where the balance of $2,811.63 still remains open as of today . However, we have released all VFX3 and VF04 for FY2024. We are in ECC 6.0

Please help to clear the balance of $2,811.63 for FY2024.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: The invoice amount field in the revenue schedule not automatically reflecting the invoice values
entry.content:
The invoice amount field in the revenue schedule in Manage Revenue accounting application should automatically reflect the invoice values after the creation of the billing document, but this is not happening. 

In our scenario, after billing, the invoice is not reflecting in the invoice amount field in the revenue schedule, But If we manually process  Z_FARRIC_REPOST_ADVANCED from SE38 for both sales order and its related invoices, then we run the FARR_RAI_MON for both sales orders and invoices. The invoice amount column will update in the revenue schedule in the revenue accounting app.

We need to update the invoice amount field value automatically without running this manual process.

How to solve this issue?

entry.title: How to generate an XAF audit file Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello,

we got the request from our dutch accountant to generate an XAF File for Auditors. Although XAF seems to be obligatory since 2010 we were not aksed until now to provide such information. When I check  the Support Portal I found a lot of notes how to establish this function by using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance but these are all valid only for S/4 HANA.

So although we have licensed SAP DRC due to other request we do not have S/4 HANA at the moment, we are still running on ECC 6.18.

There are also some very rough descriptions how to enable ECC by using DART and AIF to generate this file but these explanation are not detailed enough and AIF Setup is not really smart.

I would be pleased if somebody with an SAP ERP 6.18 share his/her customer expierence with me how to deal with this challenge.

Regards

Holger

SAP ERP SAP Document and Reporting Compliance FIN (Finance) SAP Application Interface Framework

entry.title: BTE_01: Account xxxxxxxx can't be posted with affiliation 'A' (trading partner XXXXXX)
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

User trying to create document with PO in MIRO and getting error as BTE_01: Account xxxxxxxx can't be posted with affiliation 'A' (trading partner XXXXXX).

Please advise on this

Thank you

Best Regards,

Praveen R

entry.title: ISD (input service distributor) GST complete setup in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client wants ISD configuration in ECC EHP 8 system.  I tried to implement various notes in the system but I am not able to configure ISD. Can anyone guide me the prerequisite notes and config of ISD is ECC.

entry.title: Not able to convert account to open item managed
entry.content: When we try to convert account 231013 for company code 1007 in SH3. i am getting error.

entry.title: No printout for FINT cancellation invoice
entry.content:
Hi

When cancelling an interest invoice using FINTSHOW, a credit printout of the cancellation invoice should be generated, as it is a legal requirement to send the customer a credit invoice.

However, FINTSHOW only generates the cancellation document and doesn't print it. It is not possible to use the reprint function for the cancellation invoice, since it is not displayed in FINTSHOW.

Thanks

entry.title: Block for accounting of additions of an AF with zero useful life and zero residual value
entry.content:
Dear support
I need to know if there is any parameterization at the customizing level to block postings for additions to Fixed Assets with zero useful life and zero residual value.
I was checking and couldn't find any standard options.
Could you tell me if this is possible using the BADI FIAA_002? Or is there another way to develop ABAP logic to solve this requirement of my company?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dunning should stop after last dunning level
entry.content:
I would like to stop the dunning process once it has reached the last level. I have defined 3 dunning levels in a Public Cloud SAP system.

Let me explain this based on an example:

  1. Step 1: Let’s assume customer 4711 has three open items that have already reached the last dunning level (Level 3).

  2. Step 2: When I attempt to run a new dunning process, nothing is dunned, which is expected and correct.

  3. Step 3: Now, when a new open item is posted for customer 4711, I run the dunning process again.

  4. Step 4: My expectation is that only the new open item for customer 4711 should be included in the dunning process, and the previous open items (which are already at Level 3) should not be dunned again.

I have changed and tried many configuration. Can anyone of you please support how to make this possible?

Thanks!

entry.title: Document Splitting issue - profit center not updating in all the line items
entry.content: Document Splitting issue - The profit centre is not updating in all the line items which are causing issue with the trial balance, During the clearing of invoices using payment run payment document not capturing the profit center in some of the vendor line items and GST line items

entry.title: SAP script recording and playback - FV50
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Seeking help.

I am not familiar with coding and facing issue for FV50 kind of transaction code.

I did succesfully create the script for AS01, AS02 kind.

May anyone can share the script for "SAP script recording and playback - FV50"?

Thanks.

entry.title: Missing GL account long text
entry.content:
Hi All,

G/L Acct long text are missing for some G/L Account, I check the gl line item by using FBL3N.

Not sure it is caused by the initial migration task. As I found that there are some transactions created before the account's creation date. It is possible that create GL account by some mass creation tool, but the COA view will be missing.

for example the entry date for below document is 05.09.2023. But the time dependent description only valid from 04.10.2023. Even I try to add one more for 01.01.2023 , it still can't show the description in FBL3N.

entry.title: Croatian fiscalization FI documents, business place and the fiscal number not determined
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

In our S4H Public Cloud system, we have configured Croatian fiscalization for FI documents, but the business place and the fiscal number are not being determined. The source for this data is the charging device, which is correctly identified in the document. Additionally, when creating an invoice from the SD module for the same charging device, the business place and the fiscal number are determined correctly. Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

 

Best regards,

Axians

 SAP HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Hierarchy Type FSV not available in Global Hierarchies
entry.content:
Hello, 

I was trying to create a Financial Statement Version in the production environment using the Manage Global Hierarchies app. At first I tried to import an existing Financial Statement Version, but I got the error that I don't have the authorization to do so. I have role BG_GL_ACCOUNTANT assigned with the business catalog 'SAP_SFIN_BC_GL_MD_COA' and there are no restrictions on this role. 

Next I tried to create one from scratch so that I could try to use the import function. But here I see that the Financial Statement Version is not available as an option to create:

And the authorization should be correct for this. 

So what I did instead is I converted the existing (and relevant) FSV to the Global Hierarchies using the 'Migrate Financial Statement Versions to Global Hierarchies' and I have transported this to the P system (2SL with CBC). I do now see the Financial Statement Version in the Global Hierarchies app, but I can't maintain it:

I did see this topic: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/manage-global-hierarchies-financial-statement-version-disabled/qaq-p/12320254 and this mentions Q2P being active and then you can't edit FSV in the P system and I found a note 3092272 which is about semantic tags but also mentions the Q2P. But here is where I'm confused, how do I know whether Q2P is active or not? And does this mean that if I make sure Q2P is not active for Financial Statement Versions that we can edit & create FSV in the P environment? 

Because obviously I want the key user to be able to maintain the Financial Statement Version using the Global Hierarchies going forward and not to have this maintenance stuck in the Q/CBC environment. But now I can't create a Financial Statement Version nor edit an existing Financial Statement Version.

entry.title: T093B - Asset Accounting table issue
F-36 bill of exchange reference field updating with Transaction record number
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

User is entering Reference(DRxxxxx1234) and assignent Fields manually in T code F-36 Bill Of Exchange. However, till simulate reference field is showing same text as user entered but once posting happenned, reference field and assignments are updating with Transaction record number(1xxxxxxxxx03) (The text user enters in reference and assignments fields are over riding).

User wants the same text as he entered in Reference and assignment fields. Please help where can we configurer it.
